title: QA Orbit-Resonance Attention: three rules certified orbit-invariant under T on S_9
source_attribution: GLM-5 Team, 'GLM-5: from Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering', arXiv:2602.15763 [cs.LG], Feb 2026 — empirical target whose DSA non-deterministic-topk entropy-collapse failure mode this cert's operator eliminates by construction. Reference prototype at qa_lab/qa_orbit_resonance_attention.py. Design doc at docs/theory/QA_GLM5_ARCHITECTURE_MAPPING.md. Connects cert [214] (QA Norm-Flip Signed-Temporal — Eisenstein norm classification of five T-orbit families on S_9), cert [234] (QA Chromogeometry Pythagorean Identity — cross-pair bilinear resonance form), cert [209] (QA Signal Generator Inference — T-operator canonical). Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-19.
theorem_statement: Define three resonance rules on token tuples (b, e) in {1..9}^2: family_match (same T-orbit family among Fibonacci/Lucas/Phibonacci/Tribonacci/Ninbonacci), norm_match (same Eisenstein norm f(b,e)=b*b+b*e-e*e mod 9), chromogeometry (cross-pair C_i*C_j + F_i*F_j == G_i*G_j mod 9 with (C,F,G)=(2de, ba, e*e+d*d) computed raw). All three are deterministic functions of integer tuples with no learned parameters. All three are orbit-invariant under T evolution on S_9: the attention matrix at integer path-time t equals the matrix at t=0 for every t.

determinism.note: Same input tuples produce bitwise-identical attention matrix across 100 invocations for every rule. Structurally ensured: deterministic integer functions on integer input; no learned parameters, no stochastic operators, no float state.

orbit_invariance_s9.note: Verified by independent recomputation in validator: at every step k in 0..24, attention(T^k(tokens)) == attention(tokens) for each of the three rules. Structural reasons: (i) T preserves orbit membership so family is pointwise invariant; (ii) Eisenstein norm flips sign simultaneously across all tokens under T (cert [214]) preserving pairwise equality; (iii) the cross-pair Pythagorean bilinear identity is T-preserved on S_9.

granularity_crosscut.note: family_match and norm_match crosscut on S_9. (1,1) and (1,2) are both Fibonacci-family but have Eisenstein norms 1 and 8 respectively — family_match includes them, norm_match excludes. (3,3) is Tribonacci (satellite), (9,9) is Ninbonacci (singularity), both norm 0 — norm_match includes them, family_match excludes.

design_claim_context: This operator is the QA-native replacement for DSA's learned-scoring-plus-top-k attention. GLM-5 reported that non-deterministic torch.topk caused entropy collapse within a few RL steps; they patched by forcing deterministic topk and freezing the indexer during RL. Here the failure mode is structurally impossible — there is no scoring function and no top-k. Attention is a deterministic function of integer orbit structure, orbit-invariant under evolution.
